type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (16-17) is reporting NOx, CO, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx, CO, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. The following changes occurred from 2013 to 2014, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased by 30%
2) CO emissions decreased by 46%
3) PM10 emissions increased by 121%
4) PM2.5 emissions increased by 121%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Added one (1) Caterpillar 900 hp engine in spring 2014, operational for the entire year in 2014.
2) Flaring volume increased from 1,292.3 e3m3 to 3,088.2 e3m3.
3) Increase in production for 2014.
4) Shut-in four (4) 385 hp generator engines and one (1) boiler in May 2014.
5) Installed new equipment in 2014: One (1) 1,480 hp compressor engine, two (2) 400 hp generator engines, and two (2) boilers.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (16-17) is reporting NOx, CO, PM10 and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. This facility reported NOx, CO, PM10 and PM2.5 emissions for 2012. The following changes occurred from 2012 to 2013, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 170.12 to 195.02 tonnes (+15%)
2) CO emissions increased from 84.06 to 124.03 tonnes (+48%)
3) PM10 emissions increased from 0.83 to 3.78 tonnes (+358%)
4) PM2.5 emissions increased from 0.83 to 3.78  tonnes (+358%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Added one (1) Caterpillar 900 hp engine.
2) Flaring volume increased to 1,292.3 e3m3 from 131.4 e3m3.
3) Increase in production.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (16-17) is reporting NOx, CO2, PM10 and PM2.5 emissions for 2012. This facility reported NOx and CO2 emissions for 2011. The following changes occured from 2011 to 2012, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 76.42 to 170.12 tonnes (+123%)
2) CO2 emissions increased from 80.30 to 84.06 tonnes (+5%)
3) PM10 emissions increased from 0.28 to 0.83 tonnes (+196%)
4) PM2.5 emissions increased from 0.28 to 0.83  tonnes (+196%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Added one (1) Waukesha 1480 hp engine;
2) Increased run time on all equipment.
